scripts.cf:d1:init: wrangler d1 execute freemath-db --remote --file migrations/0001_leaderboard.sql && wrangler d1 execute freemath-db --remote --file migrations/0002_rating_fields.sql
scripts.cf:deploy: pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy web/dist
scripts.cf:preview: pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy web/dist --branch preview
